title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: A multi-model workflow that routes frontend development tasks to different LLMs based on their strengths: Claude Opus for planning and reasoning, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design. Each phase is orchestrated sequentially using handoff documents to maintain context and quality.
